name: Sysmon Error Event Detected
description: Detection of a Sysmon error event. This could be an adversary's attempt to tamper with, disable, or uninstall Sysmon, which is a common defense evasion technique.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a **Sysmon Error Event** was detected with Event ID **{event_id}**. The activity involves the `sysmon.exe` process (**{image}**) and was performed under the user **{user}**. This is a strong indicator of **Defense Evasion** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1562.001**) where an adversary is likely attempting to impair security defenses by interfering with the Sysmon service to prevent logging of their malicious activities. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to restore the integrity of the Sysmon service.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon event ID (typically 255 for errors).

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The process image associated with the event, which is expected to be 'sysmon.exe'.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the error event occurred.
